hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multiple compliance providers into a single workflow to reduce manual review, improve risk visibility, and preserve audit-ready evidence for digital asset teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when dashboards stay scattered
problem_description: Compliance teams managing multiple provider dashboards struggle with slowed onboarding and manual reviews. Disconnected data creates gaps in audit trails and obscures clear risk visibility across wallets, transactions and customer profiles.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies scattered provider outputs, linking wallets, transactions, customer profiles, alerts and case actions into a single operational workflow that improves onboarding speed and strengthens audit trails.
workflow_title: From fragmented checks to unified workflow
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates scattered provider outputs, routes them through defined rules, case management, review and decision logs to deliver a structured compliance process.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One compliance view
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider dashboards into a unified compliance workflow with cases, decisions, evidence and reporting for clearer operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with connected oversight that preserves audit-ready evidence, strengthens bank due diligence and supports enterprise deployment control from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY serves compliance teams by connecting fragmented provider outputs into structured reviews, decisions, cases and reports across multiple compliance domains in one connected operational workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect multiple provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates checks from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, turning disconnected data into connected cases, workflows, decision logs and evidence for efficient review.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history, decision logs, policy changes and case details, enabling audit-ready workflows and traceable compliance records for regulator and bank due diligence reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing compliance providers and tools, integrating their outputs into one platform without replacing underlying systems or requiring provider changes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT or other providers but aggregates and structures their outputs to support consistent compliance operations and reporting.
final_title: Connect fragmented dashboards into one workflow
final_description: See how SFTY connects multiple provider outputs into a controlled compliance view with case management and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
